c6f4ca62-cab2-40dc-91d0-857c32b2e52a.label: text_chunk
c6f4ca62-cab2-40dc-91d0-857c32b2e52a.text:
Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement

This Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement ("agreement") is between the parties signing below. "We," "us" and "our" refer to both of the parties signing below and our respective affiliates. The “Company” or “Individual” named below will also be referred to as “Partner” and “The Bleecker Consulting Group, LLC” will be referred to as “BCG.”

8a90fc9f-f6d4-4b75-bc44-07c74827164e.label: text_chunk
8a90fc9f-f6d4-4b75-bc44-07c74827164e.text: COMPANY or INDIVIDUAL THE BLEECKER CONSULTING GROUP, LLC Business Entity Type: State of Incorporation: Principal Address: Business Entity Type:    Limited Liability Company State of Incorporation:    Florida, United States Principal Address: 11555 Heron Bay Blvd.

8b1fdc0c-5b28-4b44-a080-1058b79992b6.label: text_chunk
8b1fdc0c-5b28-4b44-a080-1058b79992b6.text:
, Suite 200, Coral Springs, Florida, 33076 Sign: Sign: Print Name: Print Title: Print Name:    David Bleecker Print Title:    Managing Partner Signature Date: Signature Date:

1. The purpose of this agreement.

This agreement allows us to disclose confidential information to each other, to our own affiliates and to the other's affiliates, under the following terms.

59ff0a7a-fe36-4970-b6b5-32ce1a134cc4.label: text_chunk
59ff0a7a-fe36-4970-b6b5-32ce1a134cc4.text:
An "affiliate" is any legal entity that one of us owns, that owns one of us or that is under common control with one of us. "Control" and "own" mean possessing a 50% or greater Interest in an entity or the right to direct the management of the entity.

2. Confidential information.

42d8db6c-d6cc-4808-bb09-c978289ab0ea.label: text_chunk
42d8db6c-d6cc-4808-bb09-c978289ab0ea.text:
a. What is included, "Confidential information" is non-pub l ic information,

 know-how and trade secrets in any form that:

 Are designated as "confidential"; or

 A reasonable person knows or reasonably should understand to be confidential.

b. What is not included? The following types of information, however marked,

 are not confidential information.

a0149237-637f-422d-8a00-2f30ae091203.label: text_chunk

0d6d8d95-1de4-4c5e-898f-f356f6c191e4.label: text_chunk
0d6d8d95-1de4-4c5e-898f-f356f6c191e4.text:
Treatment of confidential information.

a. In general. Subject to the other terms of this agreement, each of us agrees:

 We will not disclose the other's confidential information to third parties; and

 We will use and disclose the other's confidential information only for purposes of our business relationship with each other.

b. Security precautions. Each of us agrees:

 To take reasonable steps to protect the other's confidential information.

8c029815-2176-4404-8560-628cdcd29d07.label: text_chunk

8a08583f-4029-42ff-9c94-a4007484d73b.label: text_chunk
8a08583f-4029-42ff-9c94-a4007484d73b.text:
 A "representative" is an employee, contractor,

 advisor or consultant of one of us or one of our respective affiliates .

 Each of us may disclose the other's confidential information to our representatives (who may then disclose that confidential information to other of our representatives) only if those representatives have a need to know about it for purposes of our business relationship with each other.

d7c2bda3-57e7-4272-a718-77255f199da8.label: text_chunk
d7c2bda3-57e7-4272-a718-77255f199da8.text:
Before doing so, each of us must:

o Ensure that affiliates and representatives are required to protect the confidential information on terms consistent with this agreement;

 and

o Accept responsibility for each representative's use of confidential information.

 Neither of us is required to restrict work assignments of representatives who have had access to confidential information.

c7c5f504-85d1-482a-bab2-1a95cebd7f2f.label: text_chunk
c7c5f504-85d1-482a-bab2-1a95cebd7f2f.text:
Neither of us can control the incoming information the other will disclose to us in the course of working together, or what our representatives will remember, even without notes or other aids.

 We agree that use of information in representatives' unaided memories in the development or deployment of our respective products or services does not create liability under this agreement or trade secret law, and we agree to limit what we disclose to the other accordingly.

d. Disclosing confidential information if required to by law.

4e423140-3b2f-4a6f-b0bc-d03df3aed268.label: text_chunk
4e423140-3b2f-4a6f-b0bc-d03df3aed268.text:
Each of us may disclose the other's confidential information if required to comply with a court order or other government demand that has the force of law. Before doing so, each of us must seek the highest level of protection available and, when possible, give the other enough prior notice to provide a reasonable chance to seek a protective order.

4. Length of confidential information obligations

a. Termination. This agreement continues in effect until one of us terminates it.

6cdadcb8-25ee-4e33-8f07-3f205db3fb3e.label: text_chunk
6cdadcb8-25ee-4e33-8f07-3f205db3fb3e.text:
Either of us may terminate this agreement for any reason by providing the other with 60 days' advance written notice. Termination of this agreement will not change any of the rights and duties made while this agreement is
Page | 2
in effect.

b. No other use or disclosure of confidential information. Except as permitted above,

 neither of us will use nor disclose the other's confidential information for three years after we receive it.

785af790-153f-448a-8d88-0fec9101d606.label: text_chunk
785af790-153f-448a-8d88-0fec9101d606.text:
The three- year

time period does not apply if applicable law requires a longer period. c.

5. General rights, obligations and miscellaneous.

a. Law that applies; jurisdiction and venue.

 The laws of the State of Florida govern this agreement. If federal jurisdiction exists, we each consent to exclusive jurisdiction and venue in the federal courts in Broward County, Florida.

75762cc5-42a1-4366-84db-c1bd10235007.label: text_chunk
75762cc5-42a1-4366-84db-c1bd10235007.text:
If not, we each consent to exclusive jurisdiction and venue in the Superior Court of Broward County, Florida.

b. Non-solicitation- Clients.

 Each party expressly agrees to non-solicitation of business services with each other’s existing customers.

3c2fe381-0e16-44ab-9506-5c9df3563a0b.label: text_chunk
3c2fe381-0e16-44ab-9506-5c9df3563a0b.text:
As part of subsequent agreements between Partner and BCG to engage in joint customer business, Partner agrees not to solicit business services from any of BCG’s customers where BCG has engaged Partner on any such customer work orders and where BCG has introduced Partner to such customer(s).

    Conversely, BCG agrees not to solicit business services from any of Partner’s customers where Partner has engaged BCG on any such customer work orders and where Partner has introduced BCG to such customer(s).

3477a899-5197-4b61-bd06-a65505c1c9ca.label: text_chunk
3477a899-5197-4b61-bd06-a65505c1c9ca.text:
c. Non-solicitation- Employees.

 During the term of the agreement and for a period of twelve (12) months thereafter, each party agrees not to solicit or recruit any employee of each other without the prior written consent of that party.    Both BCG and Partner hereby agree that it will not solicit for hire, in any capacity whatsoever, any of each other’s employees, contractors or other such affiliated resources without prior written consent from the other party.

d. Compliance with law.

f8602ffd-3588-444f-870a-d9c0b81928be.label: text_chunk
f8602ffd-3588-444f-870a-d9c0b81928be.text:
Parties will comply with all laws regarding confidential information.

e. Waiver.

 Any delay or failure of either of us to exercise a right or remedy will not result in a waiver of that, or any other, right or remedy.

f. Money damages insufficient .

 Each of us acknowledges that money damages may not be sufficient compensation for a breach of th i s agreement .

f009f224-b28b-4791-946c-aada7abc347f.label: text_chunk
f009f224-b28b-4791-946c-aada7abc347f.text:
Each of us agrees that the other may seek court orders to stop confidential information from becoming public in breach of this agreement.

g. Attorneys' fees.

 In any dispute relating to this agreement the prevailing party will be entitled to recover reasonable attorneys' fees and costs.

h. Transfers of this agreement. If one of us transfers this agreement,

 we will not disclose the other's confidential information to the transferee without the other's consent .

i. Enforceabil i ty.

7f4cf457-29c3-4166-8da0-b4f5bf14d2e5.label: text_chunk
7f4cf457-29c3-4166-8da0-b4f5bf14d2e5.text:
If any provision of this agreement is unenforceable, the parties (or, if we cannot agree, a court) will r evise it so that it can be enforced. Even if no revision is possible, the rest of this agreement will remain in place.

j. Entire agreement. This agreement does not grant any implied intellectual property licenses to confidential information,

 except as stated above. We may have contracts with each other covering other specific aspects of our relationship ("other contracts").

688e8cfd-897f-4e26-b23c-b6c481728ac5.label: text_chunk
688e8cfd-897f-4e26-b23c-b6c481728ac5.text:
The other contract may include commitments about confidential information, either within it or by referencing another non-disclosure agreement. If so, those obligations remain in place for purposes of that other contract. With this exception, this is the entire agreement between us regarding confidential information. It replaces all other agreements and understandings regarding confidential information.

 We can only change this agreement with a signed document that states that it is changing this agreement.Page | 3

community_summary.16:
The relationships summarized below highlight the key aspects of an agreement and its implications for the parties involved:

1. **Agreement and Information Sharing**: The agreement governs the conditions under which information can be shared, emphasizing confidentiality obligations that must be adhered to by the parties.

2. **Framework for Business Relationship**: The agreement establishes a framework for the business relationship, detailing the management of confidential information between the involved parties.

3. **Obligations Regarding Confidential Information**: It outlines specific obligations concerning the handling of confidential information, which the parties are required to follow until the agreement is terminated.

4. **Entitlement to Attorneys' Fees**: The agreement entitles the prevailing party in any dispute to recover reasonable attorneys' fees and costs, providing a financial incentive for compliance and resolution.

5. **Enforcement by Court**: The agreement may be enforced or revised by a court if any of its provisions are deemed unenforceable, ensuring legal backing for the terms outlined.

Overall, the agreement serves as a critical document that not only governs the sharing of information and establishes business relationships but also sets forth obligations, entitlements, and mechanisms for enforcement.

community_summary.18:
The relationships summarized involve clients and a non-solicitation agreement, as well as the partnership between BCG and another partner. 

1. **Clients and Non-solicitation Agreement**: Clients have entered into a mutual non-solicitation agreement, which prohibits them from soliciting each other's existing customers for business services. This indicates a collaborative effort to protect each other's client bases.

2. **BCG and Partner**: BCG and its partner have established a mutual non-solicitation agreement that prevents either party from soliciting or recruiting the other's employees, contractors, or affiliated resources. This agreement is effective during the term of their partnership and extends for twelve months after its conclusion, highlighting the importance of maintaining workforce integrity and stability.

Overall, these relationships emphasize the significance of mutual agreements in protecting business interests and resources among clients and partners.
community_summary.19: The relationship between Partner and BCG is characterized by a collaborative engagement, as both entities have entered into agreements to work together on joint customer business initiatives. This partnership signifies a commitment to collaboration and shared objectives in their business endeavors.
